Antibody & Protein Basics.definition: The international ImMunoGeneTics information system standard for antibody numbering and region definition (FR1-FR4, CDR1-CDR3).
Antibody & Protein Basics.definition_zh: 国际免疫遗传学信息系统标准，用于抗体编号和区域定义（FR1-FR4, CDR1-CDR3）。

Antibody & Protein Basics.definition: Specific framework-2 positions (IMGT 44, 45, 47) that distinguish camelid VHH from VH, typically increasing solubility (e.g., F42, E44, R45, F47).
Antibody & Protein Basics.definition_zh: 区分驼科动物 VHH 与人源 VH 的特定框架-2 位点（IMGT 44, 45, 47），通常可增加溶解度。

Antibody & Protein Basics.definition: A mandatory quality gate ensuring the antigen-binding loops (CDRs) are 100% identical to the donor after framework humanization.
Antibody & Protein Basics.definition_zh: 强制性质控门控，确保框架人源化后抗原结合环（CDR）与供体 100% 一致。

Antibody & Protein Basics.definition: A framework-only identity metric that measures the percentage of human-matching residues in the framework regions, excluding CDRs. Threshold: VH < 85% or VL < 80% → humanization recommended.
Antibody & Protein Basics.definition_zh: 仅框架区域的同源性指标。阈值：VH < 85% 或 VL < 80% 时建议进行人源化。

Antibody & Protein Basics.definition: A set of framework residues that support the conformation of CDR loops; maintaining these is critical for affinity preservation.
Antibody & Protein Basics.definition_zh: 支撑 CDR 环构象的一组框架残基；维持这些位点对保持亲和力至关重要。

Structure & Metrics.definition: Structure-based metric for surface hydrophobicity. InSynBio Threshold: any CDR position > 0.5 or FR > 1.0 is flagged as high risk.
Structure & Metrics.definition_zh: 基于结构的表面疏水性指标。阈值：任一 CDR 位点 > 0.5 或 FR > 1.0 被标记为高风险。

Structure & Metrics.definition: Predicted Local Distance Difference Test — confidence metric for structure prediction. High: ≥ 70; Low: < 50. CDR-H3 average < 50 is flagged for high uncertainty.
Structure & Metrics.definition_zh: 结构预测置信度指标。高：≥ 70；低：< 50。CDR-H3 平均值 < 50 提示高不确定性。

Structure & Metrics.definition: Angle between VH and VL β-sheet planes. Normal: 35°–47°. Flag: < 30° or > 52°. Clinical median (AbRef-1142): 40.5°.
Structure & Metrics.definition_zh: VH 和 VL β-折叠平面之间的夹角。正常范围：35°–47°。临床中位数：40.5°。

Structure & Metrics.definition: Change in binding free energy upon mutation. Negative values (e.g., -1.5 kcal/mol) indicate improved binding affinity or stability.
Structure & Metrics.definition_zh: 突变引起的结合自由能变化。负值（如 -1.5 kcal/mol）表示亲和力或稳定性提高。

Structure & Metrics.definition: Root Mean Square Deviation — measure of average distance between atoms of superimposed proteins; lower values indicate higher structural similarity.
Structure & Metrics.definition_zh: 叠合蛋白质原子间平均距离的度量；数值越低表示结构相似性越高。

CMC & Developability Thresholds.definition: pH at which protein has no net charge. InSynBio Flag: pI > 9.0 or < 5.5. Clinical median: 8.1. Optimal for SC: 6.5–8.5.
CMC & Developability Thresholds.definition_zh: 蛋白质净电荷为零时的 pH 值。标记阈值：pI > 9.0 或 < 5.5。临床中位数：8.1。

CMC & Developability Thresholds.definition: Grand Average of Hydropathicity. Flag: > 0 (unusually hydrophobic). Typical IgG: -0.3 to -0.1.
CMC & Developability Thresholds.definition_zh: 平均亲水性指数。标记阈值：> 0（异常疏水）。典型 IgG 为 -0.3 至 -0.1。

CMC & Developability Thresholds.definition: Sequence-based predictor of stability. Flag: > 40 (predicted unstable).
CMC & Developability Thresholds.definition_zh: 基于序列的稳定性预测指标。标记阈值：> 40（预测不稳定）。

CMC & Developability Thresholds.definition: Sum of ionizable charges. Flag: > +15 (high viscosity risk). Optimal for SC: -5 to +5.
CMC & Developability Thresholds.definition_zh: 生理 pH 下的净电荷。标记阈值：> +15（高粘度风险）。皮下注射理想范围：-5 至 +5。

CMC & Developability Thresholds.definition: Total hydrophobic surface area. Flag: top 20% of clinical distribution (AbRef-1142).
CMC & Developability Thresholds.definition_zh: 表面总疏水面积。标记阈值：临床分布的前 20% (AbRef-1142)。

CMC & Developability Thresholds.definition: Measures how 'human-like' a VH/VL pair is. Threshold: < 0.70 FAIL, 0.70-0.80 WARN, ≥ 0.80 PASS, target ≥ 0.83.
CMC & Developability Thresholds.definition_zh: 衡量 VH/VL 配对的“类人性”。阈值：< 0.70 失败，≥ 0.80 通过。

Fc Engineering Mutations.definition: Standard effector silencing (ADCC/CDC ablation) in IgG1. Public domain.
Fc Engineering Mutations.definition_zh: IgG1 标准效应功能沉默突变（消除 ADCC/CDC）。公有领域。

Fc Engineering Mutations.definition: Most effective silencing variant; completely abolishes FcγR and C1q binding. Active patent (Roche).
Fc Engineering Mutations.definition_zh: 最有效的沉默变体；完全消除 FcγR 和 C1q 结合。罗氏专利。

Fc Engineering Mutations.definition: Half-life extension (11-fold FcRn affinity increase at pH 6.0). Clinical gold standard.
Fc Engineering Mutations.definition_zh: 半衰期延长突变（pH 6.0 下 FcRn 亲和力提高 11 倍）。临床金标准。

Fc Engineering Mutations.definition: Half-life extension (~10-fold FcRn affinity increase). May slightly increase pH 7.4 binding.
Fc Engineering Mutations.definition_zh: 半衰期延长突变（FcRn 亲和力提高约 10 倍）。

Fc Engineering Mutations.definition: Potent ADCC enhancement (1000-fold FcγRIIIa increase). Active patent (Xencor).
Fc Engineering Mutations.definition_zh: 强效 ADCC 增强突变（FcγRIIIa 结合力提高 1000 倍）。Xencor 专利。

Fc Engineering Mutations.definition: Removal of core fucose to increase FcγRIIIa affinity 50-100x. Most clinically validated ADCC enhancement.
Fc Engineering Mutations.definition_zh: 去除核心岩藻糖以提高 FcγRIIIa 亲和力 50-100 倍。最成熟的 ADCC 增强方法。

Bispecific Antibody Formats.definition: Fc engineering (T366W knob / T366S-L368A-Y407V hole) for heterodimerization. Public domain.
Bispecific Antibody Formats.definition_zh: 用于异二聚体化的 Fc 工程技术（杵臼结构）。公有领域。

Bispecific Antibody Formats.definition: Charge-based heterodimerization (K409D-K392D / D399K-E356K). High thermal stability.
Bispecific Antibody Formats.definition_zh: 基于电荷排斥/吸引的异二聚体化技术。热稳定性高。

Bispecific Antibody Formats.definition: Matched mutations (F405L and K409R) driving controlled Fab-arm exchange. High purity.
Bispecific Antibody Formats.definition_zh: 通过受控 Fab 臂交换实现的双抗技术。纯度高。

Bispecific Antibody Formats.definition: Two scFvs connected by a flexible linker (e.g., GGGGSx3) on a single polypeptide chain.
Bispecific Antibody Formats.definition_zh: 在单条多肽链上通过柔性 Linker 连接的两个 scFv。

Bispecific Antibody Formats.definition: Asymmetric antibody with two different Fabs, often using KiH or common light chain.
Bispecific Antibody Formats.definition_zh: 具有两个不同 Fab 的不对称抗体，常使用 KiH 或共同轻链。

CAR-T Component Library (ACTES).definition: N-terminal peptide (e.g., CD8α SP, GM-CSF SP) directing surface expression. CD8α is the clinical default.
CAR-T Component Library (ACTES).definition_zh: 引导表面表达的 N 端肽（如 CD8α SP）。CD8α 是临床默认选择。

CAR-T Component Library (ACTES).definition: Structural region (e.g., CD8α, IgG4-Fc) providing optimal distance for antigen binding. Longer spacers are often better for proximal epitopes.
CAR-T Component Library (ACTES).definition_zh: 提供抗原结合最佳距离的结构区域。较长的 Spacer 通常适用于靠近细胞膜的表位。

CAR-T Component Library (ACTES).definition: Signaling domains (4-1BB, CD28). 4-1BB promotes persistence/memory; CD28 promotes rapid/potent activation.
CAR-T Component Library (ACTES).definition_zh: 共刺激结构域。4-1BB 促进持久性/记忆；CD28 促进快速/强效激活。

CAR-T Component Library (ACTES).definition: The CD3ζ (zeta) chain containing ITAM motifs for T-cell activation signal 1.
CAR-T Component Library (ACTES).definition_zh: 包含 ITAM 基序的 CD3ζ 链，提供 T 细胞激活的第一信号。

CAR-T Component Library (ACTES).definition: T1: Approved products (e.g., Kymriah, Yescarta); T2: Clinical trials; T3: Preclinical/Research.
CAR-T Component Library (ACTES).definition_zh: T1：已上市产品；T2：临床试验阶段；T3：临床前/研究阶段。

Chemical Liabilities.definition: Asn → Asp conversion. NG is high risk in CDRs; disrupts conformation. Mutation: N→Q or N→S.
Chemical Liabilities.definition_zh: 天冬酰胺转变为天冬氨酸。CDR 中的 NG 基序具有高风险。突变建议：N→Q 或 N→S。

Chemical Liabilities.definition: Met → sulfoxide; Trp → photo-oxidation. CDR Met/Trp are high risk for potency loss. Mutation: M→L.
Chemical Liabilities.definition_zh: 甲硫氨酸/色氨酸氧化。CDR 中的 Met/Trp 具有高活性损失风险。突变建议：M→L。

Chemical Liabilities.definition: Asp → iso-Asp. DG in CDR-H3 is critical risk. Mutation: D→E.
Chemical Liabilities.definition_zh: 天冬氨酸异构化。CDR-H3 中的 DG 是关键风险。突变建议：D→E。

Chemical Liabilities.definition: Unpaired Cys outside canonical disulfides. High risk for aggregation/heterogeneity.
Chemical Liabilities.definition_zh: 非典型二硫键外的游离半胱氨酸。具有高聚合/异质性风险。
